bird.summary: The Natewa silktail (Lamprolia klinesmithi) is a species of bird endemic to Fiji. This beautiful bird looks superficially like a diminutive…

locations.name: 瓦努阿岛
locations.summary: 瓦努阿岛（斐濟語：Vanua Levu，發音：[βaˈnua ˈleβu]，意为“大土地”；印地語：वानुआ लेवु），斐济第二大岛，位于主岛维提岛以北约64公里处，面积5,587.1平方公里，人口约13万人。岛上主要城市为兰巴萨和萨…

locations.name: 斐濟
locations.summary: 斐濟共和國（英語：Republic of Fiji；斐濟語：Matanitu Tugalala o Viti；斐濟印地語：रिपब्लिक ऑफ फीजी），通稱斐濟，是位於南太平洋，瓦努阿圖以東、東加以西、吐瓦魯以南的群島國家，由322…

relations.subject: Natewa silktail
relations.evidence: The silktail is endemic to forests of Vanua Levu in Fiji, where it only occurs in the east of the island on the Natewa Peninsula

relations.subject: Natewa silktail
relations.evidence: Deforestation, especially for kava plantations, is the largest threat to this species
